tools.formCreator.flattenFormHint.en: Make form fields non-editable (converts to static content)
tools.formCreator.flattenFormHint.zh: 使表单字段不可编辑（转换为静态内容）

tools.formCreator.saveInfo.zh: 将保存 {fields} 个表单字段。

tools.formCreator.saveNote.en: Projects are saved locally in your browser.
tools.formCreator.saveNote.zh: 项目保存在浏览器本地存储中。

tools.formCreator.shortcutsHint.en: Shortcuts: Ctrl+Z (Undo) | Ctrl+Y (Redo) | Ctrl+D (Duplicate) | Ctrl+A (Select All) | Delete (Remove)
tools.formCreator.shortcutsHint.zh: 快捷键: Ctrl+Z (撤销) | Ctrl+Y (重做) | Ctrl+D (复制) | Ctrl+A (全选) | Delete (删除)

tools.formCreator.clickToAdd.en: Click on PDF to add field

tools.formCreator.blankPdfNote.en: A blank PDF will be created for you to add form fields.
tools.formCreator.blankPdfNote.zh: 将创建一个空白PDF，您可以在其中添加表单字段。

tools.formCreator.templateHint.en: Or choose a template to get started quickly
tools.formCreator.templateHint.zh: 或选择一个模板快速开始

tools.markdownToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a .md or .markdown file to convert to PDF.
tools.markdownToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放 .md 或 .markdown 文件以转换为 PDF。

tools.markdownToPdf.gfmLabel.en: Enable GitHub Flavored Markdown (tables, task lists, etc.)
tools.markdownToPdf.gfmLabel.zh: 启用 GitHub 风格 Markdown（表格、任务列表等）

tools.markdownToPdf.syntaxHighlightLabel.en: Enable syntax highlighting for code blocks

tools.markdownToPdf.successMessage.en: PDF created successfully! Click download to save.
tools.markdownToPdf.successMessage.zh: PDF 创建成功！点击下载保存。

tools.pdfToDocx.successMessage.en: Your PDF has been successfully converted to DOCX! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.pdfToDocx.successMessage.zh: 您的PDF已成功转换为DOCX！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.pdfToMarkdown.successMessage.en: Your PDF has been successfully converted to Markdown! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.pdfToMarkdown.successMessage.zh: 您的PDF已成功转换为Markdown！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.pdfToMarkdown.failed.en: Failed to convert PDF to Markdown.

tools.pdfToExcel.extractNote.en: Each page's tables will be extracted to separate sheets in the Excel file.
tools.pdfToExcel.extractNote.zh: 每一页的表格都将提取到 Excel 文件中的独立工作表中。

tools.pdfToExcel.successMessage.en: Your PDF tables have been extracted to Excel.
tools.pdfToExcel.successMessage.zh: 您的 PDF 表格已提取到 Excel。

tools.pdfToPptx.dpiHint.en: Higher DPI produces better quality slides but larger file sizes.
tools.pdfToPptx.dpiHint.zh: 较高的 DPI 会产生质量更好的幻灯片，但文件体积也会更大。

tools.pdfToPptx.veryHighSet.zh: 极高 (300 DPI - 最佳质量)

tools.pdfToPptx.successMessage.en: Your PDF has been converted to PowerPoint. Each page is now a slide with full-quality images.
tools.pdfToPptx.successMessage.zh: 您的 PDF 已成功转换为 PowerPoint。每一页现在都是具有高质量图像的幻灯片。

tools.wordToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a Word document (.docx) here, or click to browse.
tools.wordToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放Word文档（.docx）到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.wordToPdf.successMessage.en: Your Word document has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.wordToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的Word文档已成功转换为PDF！

tools.psdToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PSD (Photoshop) file here, or click to browse.
tools.psdToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 将 PSD (Photoshop) 文件拖放到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.psdToPdf.successMessage.en: PSD converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.psdToPdf.successMessage.zh: PSD 已成功转换为 PDF！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.excelToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an Excel file (.xlsx) here, or click to browse.
tools.excelToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放Excel文件（.xlsx）到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.excelToPdf.successMessage.en: Your Excel file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.excelToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的Excel文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.pptxToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PowerPoint file (.pptx) here, or click to browse.
tools.pptxToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PowerPoint文件（.pptx）到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.pptxToPdf.successMessage.en: Your PowerPoint file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.pptxToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的PowerPoint文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.xpsToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an XPS file here, or click to browse.
tools.xpsToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放XPS文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.xpsToPdf.successMessage.en: Your XPS file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.xpsToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的XPS文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.rtfToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an RTF file here, or click to browse.
tools.rtfToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放RTF文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.rtfToPdf.successMessage.en: Your RTF file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.rtfToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的RTF文件已成功转换为PDF！
